id.description: Unique identifier for the skill, prefixed with 'skill:'

name.description: Human readable name of the skill

description.description: Short description of the skill's capabilities

user_invocable.description: Whether the user can directly invoke this skill from the CLI or UI

triggers.description: Keywords or intent patterns that trigger this skill

navig-commands.description: NAVIG CLI commands this skill executes or demonstrates

tools.description: Reference to required tool schemas (prefixed with 'tool:')

author.description: Author or maintainer of the skill
